blocker: Human affiliate program signups required. All live funnel pages have PLACEHOLDER affiliate IDs. No clicks generate commissions until real IDs are inserted. See OPS/AFFILIATE_LINK_SETUP.md for exact steps (< 15 min total).

revenue_projected_90day_note: Conservative estimate assuming: affiliate signups completed within 1 week, 10 live comparison/funnel pages driving organic traffic, avg 50-100 visits/mo per page, 2-3% conversion rate, $29-49 avg product price, 20-30% commission. Upside to $500+/mo if SEO traction and content distribution ramp.
